title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. provides artificial intelligence-powered decision intelligence solutions for national security, supply chain management, and digital identity markets. The 2 analysts that cover BigBear.ai Holdings stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $5.50, which forecasts a 29.11% increase in the stock price over the next year. The lowest target is $5.00 and the highest is $6.00. Out of 6 Wall Street analysts, 1 rates it as Buy, 2 as Hold, and 0 as Sell. The consensus recommendation from 5 brokerage firms gives BigBear.ai Holdings Inc an average brokerage recommendation of Outperform status.
